_comment: Enemy NPC base stats — 1:1 from guard.cpp:25-26, robot.cpp:14-15, civilian.cpp. Guards share the same base health/speed across all weapon variants (weapon=0 blaster, 1 laser, 2 rocket — distinguished by actordef id). Do not change during GAS migration.

enemies._note: Civilian health is not set in constructor — Object base default applies.
